content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is firm with Nifty +0.49%, Pharma +2.52%, Metal +1.85%, Energy +1.26% leading. VIX cooling -4.3% to 18.86 supports risk-on. However, book is already 49% deployed with 7 positions across PSU bank, HFC, FMCG, pharma, gold, energy — focus should be position management (trailing SLs) over chasing new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — no SL/target change needed. Stock recovered to 79.43 (+1.96% today) from 77.31 close. Strong Q4 (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%). Thesis intact. Keeping SL at 77.50 (just below recent low). [No-op MODIFY would be rejected — converting to HOLD via position_actions]."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL 1035.47 already locks in ~5.2% gain on 6.2% unrealized — well-trailed. Target 1100 still ~5% upside. Today consolidating after 21-Apr surge. ICICI Sec target 1350 supports holding. No change needed — keeping HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -0.3%. SL 119 (~5% below) appropriate for volatile gold. Geopolitical hedge thesis intact with Hormuz tensions. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1418 = entry+5. Position +0.7% but SL already protects entry. No change required — HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 694.48,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 already locks in ~2% gain above entry 681. Stock at 708, near 52w high 710. Q4 results 29-Apr is binary catalyst. Current trail adequate — keep HOLD. Will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.0% unrealized. Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days). SL 2260 (~4.7% below) gives room through earnings event. Sector tailwind from Nestle's print. Hold through results — thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4% at 410, breaking out toward 52w high. Trailing SL up from 401 to 405 (just above entry 404.50) to lock in breakeven+. Target 425 intact. Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @443 from earlier still working. Stock now 446.60, trading above limit. Per ORDER HYGIENE, not stacking another order. The limit may not fill if stock continues higher — acceptable. Do not chase. Power cluster (NTPC already held) means we don't need to force this fill."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovered intraday +1.96%. Sector strong. SL 77.50 below recent swing low. Thesis intact with strong Q4. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1035.47 locking in 5.2% gain. Target 1100 still achievable. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL 119 appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already at entry+5. Adequate trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 already locks gain. Q4 results Apr 29 is binary — current trail is right. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days. SL 2260 gives event room. Sector rotating back to FMCG. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%. Moving SL from 401 to 405 (just above entry 404.50) to lock in breakeven+ as stock approaches 52w high."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIPORTS, SAIL, IDFCFIRSTB, INDUSINDBK look interesting on momentum/catalysts but adding now would push deployment >60% with overlapping clusters (NTPC already gives power exposure, PNBHOUSING+MAHABANK give financials). PHARMABEES could complement GRANULES but waiting for Granules Q4 (Apr 29) before sizing pharma bigger. AXISBANK selloff worth watching for support near 1280-1300 but provisions overhang argues for patience.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 49% deployed with 7 positions — already well-diversified across PSU bank, HFC, FMCG (2), pharma, gold, energy. Daily P&L +0.37% on a strong tape is modest, suggesting some positions are underperforming the market (HINDUNILVR, MAHABANK). Win rate 5% over 5 days is concerning — discipline on trailing SLs and avoiding new entries in correlated themes is critical. Multiple binary earnings events ahead (Granules Apr 29, HUL/Adani Ports Apr 30, NTPC May 15) — the calendar alone justifies NOT adding new risk today. Capital preservation > activity."
}
